_comment: MCP Servers Configuration. Paths are relative to the project root (MCP servers launch with CWD = project root), so this works on any checkout/platform. Simple servers speak MCP stdio (newline-delimited JSON) natively — no JS reframing bridge.

simple-pipe-mcp._info: Simple Pipe MCP server using the deployed cached native artifact.

simple-mcp._info: Simple MCP server using the deployed cached native artifact.

simple-lsp-mcp._info: Simple LSP MCP server using the deployed cached native artifact.

stitch._info: Google Stitch MCP proxy (external node tool, not a Simple server).
